activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit exception not activated
General goods description combined with explicit invoice reference in certificate

consignor.certificate_value: Esswell International AB, PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-40430, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB, PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-404 30 Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Esswell International AB' from certificate matches issuer on invoice after normalization and ignoring case and minor format differences (rule 4.1.0 for identification via occurrence in invoice). Country 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization (rule 4.1.4). Normalizations applied: case, spacing, company suffixes. No contradictions found.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Guopeiyun' as named in certificate is explicitly present in invoice's Customer/Applicant field and address section. Country 'Ethiopia' matches after normalization. Address details are consistent. Normalizations applied: case, spacing. Verified that 'Guopeiyun' is not a mere transport party but customer in invoice context.

goods_description.certificate_value: Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872
goods_description.invoice_value: Untreated Fluff Pulp Raw Material for the industry - Golden Isles Softcel 4872.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description combined with an explicit invoice reference (invoice number 508890 and date 2023-01-11) matching invoice Customer Ref and order. Textual descriptions in certificate and invoice match exactly with minor punctuation differences normalized.

quantity.invoice_value: 97.951 ADMT, 96.942 MT gross weight, 264 Rolls, 132 Packages
quantity.motivation: Quantities including 97.951 ADMT, 96.942 MT gross weight, 264 Rolls and 132 Packages are explicitly stated and identical in certificate and invoice after normalization of spacing and decimal notation. No contradictory data or units found.

origin.motivation: Country of origin 'USA' is explicitly stated in both certificate (box 3) and invoice under 'Country of Origin'. EU normalization does not apply here but country names match exactly after normalization.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points matched successfully with consistent data and allowed normalizations. No discrepancies or uncertainties identified.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollerade uppgifter i certifikatet har med säkerhet identifierats i fakturan utan avvikelser. Dokumenten stämmer överens och kan godkännas automatiskt.
